---
title: "Review of Vanity and Vexation"
---

## Review of Vanity and Vexation

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1899
**Genre:** Non-fiction, literary criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>The Guardian</i>

### Notes

Referred to in a letter to Christabel Coleridge, October 1899, and presumably published about that time.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
